clauses.obligation: Right to use Sonic System at Site for 10 years
Pay $15,000 initial franchise fee
Pay 5% of Gross Sales monthly
Contribute 0.90% of Gross Sales to SBF
Contribute to SMF via advertising cooperative
Contribute 0.25% of Gross Sales to BTF
Locate acceptable Site within 90 days of signing FA
Build per Sonic Plans and Specifications; no deviations without written approval
Principal and 1 manager must complete GM Training Program; GM Leadership Class ($200/attendee); 5-week certification for first 3 restaurants
Must open within 1 year of Site acceptance or per DA schedule. Must provide development cost report within 120 days.
Comply with Operations Manual (575 pages); Sonic may change periodically; unlimited access to POS data
clauses.restrictions: No limits on frequency or cost of upgrades

clauses.obligation: Obtain and maintain required coverages from acceptable companies; name franchisor as additional insured; 30-day cancellation notice
All advertising using marks requires prior written approval; deemed disapproved if no response in 30 days
Submit complete Gross Sales reports timely or pay 120% of last period's fees as estimate

FA terminates immediately upon notice for: insolvency, failure to secure Site, unauthorized transfer, terrorist activities, failure to operate, felony conviction, misuse of marks/trade secrets, public health endangerment, false books, 3+ defaults in 12 months (even if cured), termination of any other Sonic agreement
10 or 30 days to cure curable defaults after notice

Pay all amounts; cease use of marks; return manuals; de-identify within 30 days (change exterior/interior/color scheme); remove signs, menu housings, PAYS; Sonic may enter premises to de-identify at franchisee expense
All transfers require Sonic approval; conditions include good standing, transferee qualification, training, fee paid, upgrade, general release, new FA
Sonic has right of first refusal on same terms as third-party offer
Sonic may purchase restaurant assets within 30 days of expiration/termination; also option to purchase proprietary assets (patented equipment, menu housings, signs) at FMV
No involvement in any competing business during FA term
18 months, no competing business within 3 miles of former restaurant or any other Sonic restaurant; includes being landlord of competing business; consents to ex parte injunctions
All owners with 10%+ interest must sign personal guaranty — jointly and severally bound by all FA provisions
All innovations are Sonic's sole property; assigned as works-made-for-hire; no compensation
Broad definition including recipes, methods, customer data, passwords; no duplication; no use outside restaurant
Broad indemnification of Sonic against all losses from restaurant development/operation, FA breach, noncompliance with laws, employment claims, IP claims
Not fiduciary, agent, partner, or employee; not joint employers; must identify as independent owner
Litigation only in county of Sonic HQ (currently Atlanta, GA); Georgia law governs
clauses.carveouts: State overrides for MD, MN, ND

clauses.obligation: Prevailing party recovers reasonable costs, expenses, and attorneys' fees
